videos.title: 3 Big Lessons I Learned at 30
videos.description:
📙 ✨ Try Shortform with a free trial and $50 OFF at https://www.shortform.com/vieira

Turning 30 has been one of the most transformative milestones of my life. In this video, I share the 3 biggest lessons I’ve learned since turning 30—from personal growth and self-confidence to relationships, career decisions, and finding clarity in what truly matters.

videos.title: Why Being Bored is Actually Useful
videos.description:
📙 ✨ Try Shortform with a free trial and $50 OFF at https://www.shortform.com/vieira

Boredom might be a signal that your brain is ready for something new. When you’re bored, your mind starts to wander, which boosts creativity and new ideas, and some of your best insights can come when you’re doing absolutely nothing. Being bored helps reset your attention span in a world full of constant stimulation, and it gives your brain a break from information overload and mental fatigue.
